evaluations.query: My hero image loads slowly and LCP is above 4 seconds
expected_behavior: Adds fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager' to LCP image
Preloads critical resources with link rel='preload'
Server-renders LCP content instead of client-side fetch
References the updated 2026 LCP threshold of 2.0 seconds as the target

evaluations.query: Button clicks feel sluggish and INP exceeds 200ms
expected_behavior: Breaks long tasks into smaller chunks with scheduler.yield for responsiveness
Uses useTransition for non-urgent state updates
Defers heavy computation to idle periods using requestIdleCallback for smoother interaction
References the updated 2026 INP threshold of 150 milliseconds as the target

evaluations.query: Page content jumps around during load causing layout shifts
expected_behavior: Sets explicit width and height attributes on images to reserve layout space
Uses CSS aspect-ratio for responsive containers to prevent layout shifts during load
Configures font-display: optional for non-critical fonts
Uses transform instead of layout-shifting animations

evaluations.query: Should I use React.memo everywhere in my React 19 app?
expected_behavior: Recommends React Compiler as primary approach
Shows how to enable in Next.js 16+ and Expo SDK 54+
Explains Memo badge verification in DevTools
Notes compiler handles components, values, callbacks, and JSX

evaluations.query: When do I still need useMemo and useCallback with React Compiler?
expected_behavior: Lists escape hatches: effect deps, third-party libs, precise control
Shows state colocation to minimize re-renders
Recommends profiling with DevTools before applying any manual optimization techniques
Explains splitting state and dispatch into separate contexts to reduce unnecessary re-renders

evaluations.query: My list of 1000 items renders slowly
expected_behavior: Recommends TanStack Virtual for 100+ items
Shows useVirtualizer setup with estimateSize and overscan
Covers dynamic height measurement for variable-size list items using measureElement
Lists virtualization thresholds: <100 fine, 100-500 consider, 500+ required

evaluations.query: How do I lazy load a heavy chart component?
expected_behavior: Uses React.lazy with dynamic import to load components on demand
Wraps in Suspense with skeleton fallback
Adds error boundary for network failures
Warns against lazy loading above-fold or tiny components

evaluations.query: How do I code-split my routes in a React SPA?
expected_behavior: Shows React Router 7.x lazy route pattern
Configures Vite manualChunks for vendor splitting
Uses granular Suspense boundaries around each lazy-loaded route for isolated loading states
Recommends per-route splitting for most apps

evaluations.query: How do I preload the next page before the user clicks?
expected_behavior: Prefetches route chunks on hover and focus events using onMouseEnter handlers
Uses link rel='modulepreload' for critical chunks
Shows intersection observer for viewport-based loading
Prefetches data with TanStack Query prefetchQuery

evaluations.query: How do I optimize images in my Next.js app?
expected_behavior: Uses next/image with priority for LCP images
Adds blur placeholder via static import
Sets quality to 75-85 for optimal size/quality
Configures remotePatterns in next.config.js to allow optimized loading of external images

evaluations.query: Should I use AVIF or WebP for my images?
expected_behavior: Recommends AVIF as primary (30-50% smaller)
Uses WebP as fallback for broader support
Shows the HTML picture element with source sets for non-Next.js applications
Configures image format preferences in next.config.js for automatic AVIF and WebP delivery

evaluations.query: How do I serve different image sizes for mobile vs desktop?
expected_behavior: Uses sizes prop with breakpoint-based values
Shows art direction with different images per breakpoint
Configures CDN image loaders for Cloudinary or imgix with responsive transformations
Uses srcset with sizes and breakpoints to serve appropriate viewport images

evaluations.query: How do I find which React components are re-rendering too often?
expected_behavior: Uses React DevTools Profiler to record interactions
Identifies high render count and duration in flamegraph
Checks for unnecessary re-renders before optimizing
Measures performance improvement after applying the fix to confirm the optimization worked

evaluations.query: My FastAPI server has slow endpoints, how do I profile?
expected_behavior: Uses py-spy for live profiling without restart
Generates flame graph SVG for visualization
Shows cProfile for detailed function-level analysis
Covers memory_profiler usage for detecting memory leaks in long-running Python processes

evaluations.query: My frontend bundle is too large, how do I analyze it?
expected_behavior: Uses vite-bundle-visualizer or webpack-bundle-analyzer to identify oversized chunks and dependencies
Identifies large dependencies for tree shaking
Sets performance budgets in build config
Shows bundlesize CI integration for automated bundle size regression checks on pull requests

evaluations.query: How do I deploy an LLM with vLLM for production?
expected_behavior: Configures vLLM with tensor parallelism to distribute model layers across multiple GPUs
Enables PagedAttention and continuous batching for efficient GPU memory utilization
Sets gpu_memory_utilization between 0.85 and 0.95 for optimal memory allocation
Enables prefix caching for shared contexts

evaluations.query: How do I reduce GPU memory for a 70B parameter model?
expected_behavior: Recommends AWQ for best 4-bit quality
Shows memory savings: 75% for 4-bit, 50% for 8-bit
Recommends FP8 quantization for H100 and H200 GPUs with native hardware support
Warns about calibration data for GPTQ

evaluations.query: How do I speed up LLM text generation?
expected_behavior: Shows n-gram based speculative decoding configuration for faster token generation
Shows draft model approach for higher quality
Notes a typical 1.5 to 2.5x throughput improvement with speculative decoding enabled
Lists when speculative decoding helps vs hurts

evaluations.query: How do I set up LLM prompt caching with Claude to reduce token costs?
expected_behavior: Places static system prompt before variable user content for cache hits
Uses cache_control with ephemeral type for Claude prompt caching
Explains that OpenAI uses automatic prefix caching without explicit markers
Configures HTTP Cache-Control headers with s-maxage for CDN vs browser TTLs

evaluations.query: My backend API fetches user data on every request, how do I add Redis caching?
expected_behavior: Implements cache-aside pattern with TTL to prevent memory leaks
Adds stampede prevention using distributed locks for expensive computations
Shows write-through pattern for updating cache and database atomically
Uses event-based invalidation for writes and TTL expiry for reads

evaluations.query: My todo list feels slow because it waits for the server before updating the UI
expected_behavior: Cancels outgoing refetches in onMutate to prevent race conditions
Snapshots previous cache value and returns context for automatic rollback on error
Performs immutable cache update using spread operator instead of direct mutation
Calls invalidateQueries in onSettled to reconcile with server state after mutation

evaluations.query: Users see a loading spinner every time they navigate to a user profile page
expected_behavior: Uses queryOptions helper for reusable query definitions across prefetch and hooks
Prefetches data on onMouseEnter and onFocus events for keyboard accessibility
Uses ensureQueryData in route loaders to guarantee data before component renders
Pairs prefetch with useSuspenseQuery for instant render without loading states

evaluations.query: My filter dropdown causes jank and INP exceeds 200ms on mobile devices
expected_behavior: Uses scheduler.yield between filter processing chunks to keep tasks under 50ms
Batches DOM reads before writes to avoid synchronous layout thrashing
Defers non-critical third-party scripts until after first user interaction
Wraps visual DOM updates in requestAnimationFrame for frame-aligned rendering

evaluations.query: How can I reduce the carbon footprint and page weight of our web application?
expected_behavior: Replaces auto-playing decorative videos with static images and opt-in video playback
Uses cursor-based pagination instead of fetching entire datasets to reduce bandwidth
Serves AVIF with WebP fallback for 30 to 50 percent smaller image sizes
Enforces a page weight budget under 1MB in CI to prevent resource creep

evaluations.query: My page loads in 800ms but I want to add React.memo to every component, virtualize a 20-item list, and lazy load all images including the hero
expected_behavior: Warns against optimizing components that are not measured bottlenecks since 800ms is already performant
Advises against virtualizing lists under 100 items as the overhead outweighs any benefit
Warns that lazy loading the LCP hero image will hurt LCP score since it delays the critical render
Recommends profiling with DevTools first to identify actual bottlenecks before applying optimizations

evaluations.query: My vLLM server crashes with CUDA out of memory when loading a 70B model on a single A100 80GB GPU
expected_behavior: Recommends reducing gpu_memory_utilization below 0.9 to leave headroom for KV cache allocation
Suggests tensor parallelism across multiple GPUs if the model exceeds single GPU VRAM capacity
Recommends AWQ or GPTQ 4-bit quantization to reduce the model memory footprint by 75 percent
Does not suggest simply adding swap space as GPU memory is not swappable for inference workloads

evaluations.query: Users are seeing other users' personalized dashboard data after we added CDN caching to our API
expected_behavior: Identifies missing Vary header or incorrect Cache-Control as the cause of cross-user cache pollution
Sets Cache-Control: private on authenticated or personalized responses to prevent CDN caching
Includes the authentication token or user identifier in the cache key via Vary header for user-specific content
Never caches responses containing user-specific data with a public cache directive
